stemHtml: The ATC receives the message “Disconnected from LOVV. Connecting to LOVL”. What is the meaning of that transmission?

options.a: The pilot is informed that he manually disconnected from CPDLC LOVV and connected to CPDLC LOVL.
options.b: The aircraft has automatically disconnected from CPDLC LOVV and is connecting to CPDLC LOVL.
options.c: The pilot is informed that the aircraft has automatically switched from CPDLC LOVV to CPDLC LOVL.
options.d: The aircraft is currently not connected to any CPDLC station.
